use_cases: Display user profile pictures in applications requiring user identification
Provide fallback initials when avatar images fail to load
Create avatar stacks with status badges for team or contact lists
ai_summary: An Avatar component system built with Radix UI primitives that provides circular profile picture display with multiple sub-components. Includes AvatarImage for image display, AvatarFallback for initial/text fallbacks, AvatarIndicator for positioned overlays, and AvatarStatus with color-coded variants (online, offline, busy, away). Uses standard Tailwind utility classes for minimal, flat styling suitable for any application requiring user profile display functionality.
